name: BinaryFilterExpression
summary: The BinaryFilterExpression class represents a binary expression between two filter expressions. This class cannot be inherited.

constructors.name: BinaryFilterExpression(BooleanFilterExpression, BooleanOperatorType, BooleanConstantFilterExpression)
constructors.signature: public BinaryFilterExpression(BooleanFilterExpression Left, BooleanOperatorType Oper, BooleanConstantFilterExpression Right)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BinaryFilterExpression class.

params.name: Left
params.doc: The left operand of the filter expression.

params.name: Oper
params.doc: The operator of the filter expression.

params.name: Right
params.doc: The right operand of the filter expression.

throws.when: Thrown when a null filter expression is specified.
